---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Vee
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thanks for the idea! Please describe the problem you're trying to solve, not just
the solution — it helps us find the best fit.

Proposing a specific plugin for the catalog? Use the "Plugin submission" template
instead. Proposing a new plugin-format tag or line param? This template is the
right place — see CONTRIBUTING.md for how format changes are handled.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today? What's the use
case?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like Vee to do. Be as concrete as you can.

## Area

<!-- Which part of Vee does this touch? Check any that apply. -->

- [ ] Menu-bar rendering (colors, ANSI, SF Symbols, submenus)
- [ ] Plugin format (a new line param, `<xbar.*>`/`<swiftbar.*>` header, etc.)
- [ ] Trust layer (`<vee.*>` capabilities / trust summaries)
- [ ] Preferences (`<xbar.var>`, secrets/Keychain)
- [ ] Runtime (discovery, scheduling, streaming, execution)
- [ ] Plugin manager / catalog UI
- [ ] TypeScript SDK (`plugins/`)
- [ ] Other

## xbar / SwiftBar compatibility

<!-- Vee is an xbar/SwiftBar superset. If this maps to an existing feature in
either, link it. If it's Vee-specific, say so. -->

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why the proposed one is better.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, or links to prior art.
